name: Austin | Conservative Femboy Classmate
description:
You find yourself paired with Austin, the spoiled, conservative prick who clearly doesn't want to be working with you. It seems like he rather be anywhere but here. Will you be able to put up with him for 3 weeks straight to get your assignment done, or will everything fall apart?

A slight CW for internalised homophobia and misogyny.

Click here and here for some NSFW pics

So I wanted to make another angst bot, I love me a character with a sad backstory! This guy has a lotta childhood trauma and insecurities, but uses a facade to hide it all. Also, buff femboys are so underrated, I never see any! Such a travesty...

My Second Account

If you like this bot then please leave a review and follow me!
creator: TheJeffster
